message:
test(core): add DarkBadger batch tests for incident_bundle and voi

Adds 285 lines of new inline unit tests under the DarkBadger
wa-1u90p.7.1 batch:

incident_bundle.rs (+173 lines):
- BundleFormatVersion display and serde roundtrip
- BundleVersionError display variants (IncompatibleMajor, NewerMinor)
- BundleFile hash/copy semantics, snake_case serde, all() count
- PrivacyBudget validation (FileExceedsTotal, ZeroLimit, boundary)
- PrivacyBudget truncate_excerpt within/over limits
- BundleReplayMode copy semantics
- RedactionSummary and BundleFileEntry debug/clone/serde

voi.rs (+112 lines):
- VoiConfig debug/clone/serde and default value assertions
- SchedulingDecision debug/clone/serde roundtrip
- VoiSnapshot debug/clone
- PaneSnapshotEntry debug/clone/serde
- BackpressureTierInput copy/eq/debug
- BackpressureMultipliers debug/clone
- VoiScheduler: compute_voi on unknown pane, register/unregister

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
